SEARCH

Class Room

java.lang.Object
Room
public class Room extends Object
Room class - represents a single location in the "Henriette's Feast" game. Each room has a text description and exits to neighboring rooms, stored in a HashMap that maps directions (e.g. "north", "up") to rooms.
Author:
Raphaël Quillaud

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Room(String pDescription)
    Creates a room with the given description and no exits yet.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getDescription()
    Returns the description of this room.
    Room
    getExit(String pDirection)
    Returns the neighboring room in the given direction, or null if there is no exit in that direction.
    String
    getExitString()
    Builds and returns a string listing all available exits from this room, in the form "Exits : north east up".
    void
    setExit(String pDirection, Room pNeighbor)
    Defines an exit from this room in the given direction.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Room

      public Room(String pDescription)
      Creates a room with the given description and no exits yet.
      Parameters:
      pDescription - the textual description of this room

  • Method Details

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Returns the description of this room.
      Returns:
      the room description

    • setExit

      public void setExit(String pDirection, Room pNeighbor)
      Defines an exit from this room in the given direction.
      Parameters:
      pDirection - the direction of the exit (e.g. "north", "east", "up")
      pNeighbor - the neighboring room in that direction

    • getExit

      public Room getExit(String pDirection)
      Returns the neighboring room in the given direction, or null if there is no exit in that direction.
      Parameters:
      pDirection - the direction of the desired exit
      Returns:
      the neighboring room, or null if none

    • getExitString

      public String getExitString()
      Builds and returns a string listing all available exits from this room, in the form "Exits : north east up".
      Returns:
      a string describing the exits of this room
